feature: Creator Analytics - Anomaly Detection, Demographics, Best Times, Revenue Tracking
summary: Tested all 3 analytics features: 1) AI-powered Anomaly Detection with z-score analysis, 2) Audience Demographics & Best Time to Post, 3) Revenue Tracking per platform. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 6 tabs working with proper data display.

backend_api_tests.details: Returns list of content with stats
Runs z-score anomaly detection, detected anomalies with platform_id, metric, direction (spike/drop), z_score, change_pct, severity
Returns list of anomaly alerts with severity (warning/critical)
Dismisses anomaly alert with {platform_id, metric} body
Returns age_groups, gender_split, interests, devices, platform_audiences
Returns 7x24 heatmap, days, hours, top_slots, recommendations with day/time_range/score/label
Returns total_revenue, by_platform, by_source, monthly_trend (12 months), top_earning_content

frontend_tests.test: All 6 tabs visible (Overview, Anomaly Detection, Demographics, Best Time to Post, Content, Revenue)
Overview tab shows stat cards, content by type, quick stats
Anomaly Detection tab shows 'Run Scan' button
Anomaly alerts display with spike/drop indicators, severity badges (warning/critical), dismiss buttons
frontend_tests.details: 6 anomalies detected with correct visual indicators

frontend_tests.test: Demographics tab shows age distribution bars
Demographics tab shows gender split chart
Demographics tab shows interests with affinity index
Best Time to Post tab shows 7x24 engagement heatmap
Best Time to Post tab shows recommended posting windows with Peak/High/Good labels
Revenue tab shows total revenue summary
Revenue tab shows revenue by platform bars
Revenue tab shows revenue by source
Revenue tab shows top earning content

critical_code_review_comments: Anomaly detection uses z-score statistical analysis (threshold 2.0) - real implementation, not mocked
Demographics data includes realistic music/entertainment audience percentages
Revenue data is seeded on first call with 12 months of historical data across 10 platforms
Heatmap engagement analysis generates realistic patterns (weekday evening peaks)
All services use MongoDB for caching/storage with appropriate TTLs
seed_data_creation: Revenue data seeded with 12 months of transactions across 10 platforms. Metrics history seeded with 30 days of data for 6 platforms (youtube, twitter_x, spotify, tiktok, instagram, soundcloud). Anomalies injected on latest day for youtube and tiktok.

mocked_api.description: Demographics percentages are realistic for music/entertainment audiences. Revenue data is generated from seed function with realistic distribution. Anomaly detection uses real z-score statistical analysis on seeded metric history.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Creator Analytics page at /creator-analytics has 6 working tabs: Overview, Anomaly Detection, Demographics, Best Time to Post, Content, Revenue. Anomaly scan populates metric history if none exists and detects statistical outliers. Demographics/Revenue/BestTimes endpoints seed data on first call if empty. All data persists in MongoDB collections: anomaly_alerts, metrics_history, audience_analytics, revenue_tracking.
